title: The Briefing: Financial Services
summary: Anthropic announced that major global banks are deploying Claude across their operations. Anthropic held a briefing event featuring leaders from financial institutions discussing their implementations.
writeup: This video documents The Briefing: Financial Services, a virtual event Anthropic hosted in which banking leaders described how they deployed Claude across their organizations. It marks Anthropic's announcement that some of the world's largest banks are putting Claude into use enterprise-wide. The key takeaway is the move of large language models from pilots into broad adoption within major financial institutions, with the implementations presented directly by the banking leaders running them.
